name: S-4 --check-shallow-provenance flags rules whose provenance array is empty per the gap analyzer
command:
printf -- '- id: g
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - {id: thin-rule, provenance: []}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit r.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree --check-shallow-provenance && grep -q '### Shallow provenance' r.md && grep -q 'shallow provenance' r.md && echo shallow 1>&2
